title: Check bot logs for command error

log.context: Check bot logs for command error

Here's a full summary of what the logs show:

---

**Two distinct errors are crashing the bot:**

**Error 1: API 400 — Invalid JSON (surrogate character)**

Every single Discord message is being rejected by the Claude API with:
```
API Error: 400
{"type":"error","error":{"type":"invalid_request_error","message":"The request body is not valid JSON: no low surrogate in string: line 1 column 417388 (char 417387)"},"request_id":"..."}
```
